prompt: Rich Byzantine-inspired editorial illustration, vertical format. Saint Gregory Palamas — a bearded monk-bishop in dark robes — standing on Mount Athos, surrounded by golden uncreated light (Tabor light) radiating from within him. Around him: four open ancient books/scrolls arranged like a reading list, each glowing softly with different intensity (from simple to deep). The background transitions from earthly stone monastery at the bottom to pure divine gold light at the top. Deep tones: burgundy, midnight blue, aged gold, dark amber. Thick textured brushstrokes, mosaic-like fragments in the golden light. Style: between Byzantine icon and modern editorial book illustration. No text. Mood: sacred knowledge, layers of depth, invitation to study.
